evals.prompt: How do I enrich a LinkedIn profile with a verified email in Prospeo?
evals.expected_output: Guidance on using Prospeo's Enrich Person endpoint with a LinkedIn URL to get a verified email

assertions.name: mentions_enrich_person
assertions.description: Response must mention the Enrich Person feature or /enrich-person endpoint

assertions.name: explains_linkedin_input
assertions.description: Response must explain that a LinkedIn URL can be used as standalone input for enrichment

assertions.name: mentions_credit_cost
assertions.description: Response must mention the credit cost (1 credit for email, 10 for mobile)

evals.prompt: I need to find VP-level contacts at SaaS companies with 100-500 employees using Prospeo. How do I do this?
evals.expected_output: Guidance on using Prospeo's Search Person with seniority and company filters, then enriching results

assertions.name: mentions_search_person
assertions.description: Response must mention Search Person or /search-person as the starting point

assertions.name: explains_two_step
assertions.description: Response must explain that search does NOT return emails — enrichment is a separate step

assertions.name: mentions_filters
assertions.description: Response must mention relevant filters like person_seniority, company_headcount_range, or company_industry

evals.prompt: How do I use the Prospeo API to bulk enrich 200 contacts with emails?
evals.expected_output: Guidance on using the Bulk Enrich Person API endpoint with batching

assertions.name: explains_batch_limit
assertions.description: Response must mention the 50-record-per-request limit and the need to batch into multiple calls

assertions.name: shows_auth
assertions.description: Response must mention X-KEY header authentication
